values.value: [ { "fieldName": "CaseNumber", "label": "Case Number", "type": "url", "isSortable": false, "isVisible": true, "sortOrder": 1 }, { "fieldName": "Contact_Name", "label": "Contact Name", "type": "text", "isSortable": true, "isVisible": true, "sortOrder": 2 }, { "fieldName": "Status", "label": "Status", "type": "text", "isSortable": true, "isVisible": true, "sortOrder": 3 }, { "fieldName": "Priority", "label": "Priority", "type": "text", "isSortable": false, "isVisible": true, "sortOrder": 4 }, { "fieldName": "SuppliedEmail", "label": "Supplied Email", "type": "text", "isSortable": false, "isVisible": true, "sortOrder": 5 }, { "fieldName": "Subject", "label": "Subject", "type": "text", "isSortable": false, "isVisible": true, "sortOrder": 6 }, { "fieldName": "Description", "label": "Description", "type": "text", "isSortable": false, "isVisible": false, "sortOrder": 7 }, { "fieldName": "Origin", "label": "Origin", "type": "text", "isSortable": false, "isVisible": false, "sortOrder": 8 } ]
SELECT Id, CaseNumber, ContactId, AccountId,Contact.Name, Account.Name, Status, Priority, SuppliedEmail, Description, Subject, Origin FROM Case
